_comment: Frozen Korean translations that SEED the store-capture run, layered on top of the E2E GT_KO map. Authentic-quality strings, frozen for byte-for-byte reproducibility (the spec's 'freeze해 시드'). Regenerate from live Google Translate with `npm run capture:store -- --freeze`. Only the styled store fixtures' extra strings live here; the shared lesson/quiz body strings come from tests/e2e/helpers/network-stubs.js GT_KO.
